name: Cherry Dump Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Box white or yellow cake mix
1/4 pound Butter or margarine, at room temperature
1/2 cup Chopped nuts (Walnuts or Pecans preferred)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer, blend the cake mix with the butter until it is fine and crumbly.
2. Press about 1 cup of the mixture into the bottom of a 9x14-inch baking pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for about 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
4. Pour the cherry pie filling over the hot baked crust.
5. Mix the chopped nuts with the remaining cake mix mixture.
6. Sprinkle the nut mixture over the pie filling.
7. Return to the oven and bake for about 30-40 minutes, or until the crumbly mixture is lightly browned.
8. Serve with a scoop of vanilla ice cream or whipped cream.
Variations might be: Use chocolate cake mix and use apple pie filling, or
chocolate cake mix and cherry pie filling...use your imagination.
